mutex.c(3) Library Functions Manual mutex.c(3)

NAME

mutex.c - Platform-agnostic mutex hooks and utilities.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void mutex_on_lock (mutex_t *mutex)
Hook called when a mutex is successfully locked. void mutex_on_unlock (mutex_t *mutex)
Hook called when a mutex is unlocked. void mutex_on_trylock (mutex_t *mutex, bool success)
Hook called when a mutex trylock is attempted. int mutex_format_state (const mutex_t *mutex, char *buffer, size_t size)
Format mutex timing and state info into buffer. void mutex_log_state (const mutex_t *mutex, const char *file, int line, const char *func)
Log the state of a mutex.

Detailed Description

Platform-agnostic mutex hooks and utilities.

This file provides hook functions that can be called from platform-specific mutex implementations to record events and debug information. All hooks are debug-only and disabled in release builds.

Definition in file platform/mutex.c.
